title: Old Seam — A Following
description: Old Seam, the wandering preacher, walks the dome perimeter at the same hours as Oracle Nesha. Not behind her — parallel, just out of speaking range. Twenty years.

objectives.description: Walk the dome perimeter during Quartus and observe Old Seam following Nesha at a distance.

breadcrumbs.content: Old Seam taught Nesha. Nesha was Old Seam's apprentice. They have not spoken in twenty years.

title: Old Seam — Master and Student
description: Talk to both. Each will tell a partial story. The shape of the falling-out is the same; the cause is told differently.

breadcrumbs.content: Old Seam says Nesha 'saw too far too fast.' Nesha says Old Seam 'wouldn't read what was in front of her.' Both are right.

title: Old Seam — Bring her in
description: Old Seam takes a small supper at the Seven Spokes every Penanus. Persuade her to come, then to walk to the Refusal Keep, then to speak to Nesha.

objectives.description: Talk Old Seam into walking with you to the Keep.
Arrive at the Keep with Old Seam following.
Hand Old Seam off to Nesha.

breadcrumbs.content: Old Seam and Nesha walk the dome together now. The field strengthens by a measurable margin. Some quiet things are also healing.
